content: NATS JetStream WorkQueuePolicy: StreamConfig with Retention: jetstream.WorkQueuePolicy enforces FIFO queue semantics. Each message consumed once, deleted on Ack. Only one consumer per subject allowed (non-overlapping filter subjects required). MaxMsgs + DiscardNew provides backpressure by rejecting new messages when queue full. MaxDeliver on consumer config controls retry count. AckWait controls timeout before redelivery. MaxBackoff sets upper bound on retry delay. WorkQueuePolicy is additive to limits - if MaxMsgs set with DiscardOld, old messages deleted even without consumer. Messages reaching MaxDeliver remain in stream and must be manually deleted via JetStream API.
